in_progress: n=50 fresh probe confirmed floor 5 at gen 0 (seed divisor-ring), never improved in 40 gens

rows.note: 2026-07-22 survey: independent fresh lineage; verified (3 impl). Sibling fresh lineage stuck at 26, ring-approx seed lineage at 19. Round-2 (search volume equalized to n=53, +2 fresh lineages): 32 and 13 — best stays 9. Pre-registered criterion: structure side.

2026-07-22 survey: fresh lineage beat the T1' constructive bound 7 at gen 12; verified (3 impl). Ring-seeded lineage stayed at its seed value 7 for 40 gens. Earlier 40-gen fresh probe had stalled at 17.
main line; re-confirmed by 152-generation control run

independent fresh lineage (track B), gen 35; verified: 3 margin-0 + 1 margin-1 vertices, min outdeg 17. Earlier excess-10 witness (champion_n53_cdfde747) retained as data. Extended to 80 generations: no improvement after gen 35; together with the exhaustive depth-2 search around the keystone (171288 pairs, no decrease), excess 5 is robust at n=53. Control: a ring-approximation seed (unequal 7-layer C_7^2 + in-star, excess 33) stagnated for 40 generations — at primes the ring blueprint fails even as a starting point; the floor is reached by non-ring asymmetric structure.

2026-07-22 survey: independent fresh lineage; verified (3 impl). Sibling fresh and ring lineages stuck at 35. Round-2 +2 fresh lineages: 35 and 22 — best stays 7. Pre-registered criterion: hold, one more lineage running.
partial run (stopped at gen 13; already at ring bound)

delta_slide.note: 2026-07-22: floor unmoved at delta>=9 and delta>=10 — the divisor-ring seed (out-degree 10) satisfies both constraints; 40 generations never improved on it. The excess floor is insensitive to the delta detail.

fresh_only_controls.purpose: control group: fresh-only search values at composite n (divisor-ring seed h9 excluded from seeding) — measures search reachability, NOT the floor

points.contrast: constructive floor is 3 (T1 pure ring, 48=3*16) — fresh search missed it by 10: evolution alone badly underestimates composite floors
with the h9 seed the same n yields 5 — the seed, not the search, carried the composite floor

fresh_only_controls.reading: controls sit ABOVE neighbouring primes (47:9, 49:6, 53:5) — the monotone small-n congestion explanation is rejected; per-lineage variance (47: 9/13/32, 59: 7/22/35) exceeds the staircase gaps
